name: Arcade
imageAlt: A heading reads 'Welcome to the Arcade!' on a dark purple background. Below the heading are three tall rectangles, each with the name of a game, a screenshot of the game, and a small blurb with the game objective.
about: I love games and wanted a place to collect all the ones I make, so created this arcade! Built in Astro so I can practice in different frameworks when I want to. Some are games I created following tutorials and some are ones I created on my own.
